issues.sample: WHEN COMING TO A STOP , THE ENGINE SPEED OR RPM WILL HANG UP AT AROUND 2500 RPM FOR SEVERAL SECONDS,,,INSTEAD OF GOING TO IDLE RPM SPEED.THIS CAUSES THE OPERATOR TO HAVE TO PULL IN THE CLUTCH AND BRAKE MORE AGGRESIVLY THAN NORMAL...ONE DAY THIS IS GOING TO KIL SOMEONE.  NORMALY A

narrative.headline: What 2015 Indian Scout owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 8 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (50% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
